debug_info.goal:
case neg.refine_3.inr
ι : Type u_1
𝕜 : Type u_2
V : Type u_3
inst✝⁵ : DecidableEq ι
inst✝⁴ : Field 𝕜
inst✝³ : LinearOrder 𝕜
inst✝² : IsStrictOrderedRing 𝕜
inst✝¹ : AddCommGroup V
inst✝ : Module 𝕜 V
s : Finset ι
x y : ι → V
hs : s.Nontrivial
z : V
c : ι → 𝕜
hc₀ : ∀ i ∈ s, 0 ≤ c i
hc₁ : ∀ i ∈ s, c i ≤ 1
hz : ∀ i ∈ s, (lineMap (y i) (x i)) (c i) = z
i : ι
hi : i ∈ s
hci : c i ≠ 1
hy : ∀ i ∈ s, y i ∈ (convexHull 𝕜) (x '' ↑(s.erase i))
w : ι → 𝕜
hw₀ : ∀ i_1 ∈ s.erase i, 0 ≤ w i_1
hw₁ : ∑ i ∈ s.erase i, w i = 1
hyi : (s.erase i).centerMass w x = y i
j : ι
hj : j ∈ s
hij : i ≠ j
this : (lineMap (y i) (x i)) (c i) = (lineMap (y j) (x j)) (c j)
⊢ ((if i ∈ s ∧ ¬i = j then c i else 0) + ∑ x ∈ s \ {j}, (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x)⁻¹ •
      ∑ x_1 ∈ s \ {j}, (Pi.single i (c i) x_1 + (1 - c i) * Function.update w i 0 x_1) • x x_1 =
    y j

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨wj, hwj₀, hwj₁, hyj⟩ := mem_convexHull_image.1 <| hy j hj
    convert hyj using 2 <;> simp_all [sdiff_singleton_eq_erase, Pi.single_apply, Function.update_apply, sum_ite_mem, ← mul_sum]

rw [lineMap_apply, lineMap_apply] at this
    simp only [vsub_eq_sub, vadd_eq_add] at this
    sorry

obtain ⟨wj, hwj₀, hwj₁, hyj⟩ := mem_convexHull_image.1 <| hy j hj
    rw [← hyj, centerMass]
    simp only [sdiff_singleton_eq_erase, Pi.single_apply, sum_ite_mem, inter_self, sum_singleton,
      if_neg hij.symm, zero_add, Pi.add_apply, Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, ← mul_sum]
    simp only [Function.update_apply, ite_eq_right_iff, mul_ite, mul_zero]
    sorry

obtain ⟨wj, hwj₀, hwj₁, hyj⟩ := mem_convexHull_image.1 <| hy j hj
    simp only [lineMap_apply] at this
    sorry
